content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 6, 0), (6, 7, 0), (1, 9, 1), (7, 8, 1), (2, 6, 4), (2, 9, 4), (1, 4, 5), (0, 7, 9), (3, 4, 9), (0, 9, 14), (4, 8, 14), (4, 7, 16), (5, 9, 18)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 9 exactly at time 18.

First, we will scan each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (3, 6, 0) has node 3 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (6, 7, 0) has node 6 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 9, 1) has node 1 and time 1. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (7, 8, 1) has node 7 and time 1. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 6, 4) has node 2 and time 4. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 9, 4) has node 2 and time 4. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 4, 5) has node 1 and time 5. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (0, 7, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 4, 9) has node 3 and time 9. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (0, 9, 14) has node 0 and time 14. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 8, 14) has node 4 and time 14. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 7, 16) has node 4 and time 16. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 9, 18) has node 5 and time 18. -> Ignore.

The nodes matched are 6, 7, 8, 9.

Answer: [6, 7, 8, 9]
